name: Princeton Technology Corporation
summary: Princeton Technology Corporation operates as a fabless IC design company in Taiwan. It provides IC technology for energy-saving solutions, including a series of energy-saving ballast driver ICs, LED lighting/backlight driver ICs, and brushless DC motor ICs for use in various indoor/outdoor lighting and motor control products. The company also offers display driver, multimedia audio controller, LED driver, motor driver, RF, encoder/decoder, remote control, GPS, I/O expander, power, and PFC controller ICs, as well as ASICs, microcontrollers, and automotive solutions. Its products are used in automotive dash-board and multimedia devices, portable audio players, digital TVs, home audio/video appliances, DSCs, DSLRs, monitoring cameras, and car security systems. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
